examples: He felt homesick, but made a brave attempt to appear cheerful.
He was so homesick that he could hardly endure the misery of it.
After the first few weeks abroad, many students will feel a little homesick.
Besides, she reminds her big sister, Renee(ph), it's terrible to be homesick for New Orleans.
Still, homesick eaters are more than willing to shell out for their beloved treats.
